name: Sophia

projects.title: AI-Powered Resume Analyzer
projects.description: A tool that leverages natural language processing to extract and analyze key information from resumes, providing insights for recruiters and job seekers.

projects.title: Scalable Chatbot Framework
projects.description: A highly scalable chatbot framework designed to handle over 1 million concurrent users, built with Node.js and integrated with GPT-based models.

projects.title: Smart Expense Tracker
projects.description: A web application that uses machine learning to categorize expenses and provide personalized financial insights for users.

projects.title: NLP-Powered Sentiment Analysis Tool
projects.description: A sentiment analysis platform that processes user reviews and social media data to provide actionable insights for businesses.

projects.title: Real-Time Collaboration Platform
projects.description: A real-time collaboration tool for teams, featuring live document editing, video calls, and task management.

projects.title: Personalized Learning Recommendation System
projects.description: A recommendation system that uses AI to suggest personalized learning paths based on user preferences and progress.

projects.title: Next.js Financial Dashboard
projects.description: Web application built upon React-based Next.js framework; works include: implement an app for users to track the financial invoices, including visualizing the data, creating, reading, updating, and deleting (CRUD) invoices, etc; and create the database using the Neon database in Next.js from Vercel and deploy the app using Vercel

services.title: Art Direction
services.description: We help with the creation and development of online advertising ideas, with particular focus on their visual appearance.

services.title: Branding
services.description: We design key brand elements such as the logo, color scheme, typography, and other design components that makes your brand stand out from competitors.

services.title: Web Design
services.description: We build and optimize your online presence. Website is the digital entry point into your business and a powerful revenue channel.

services.title: 3D Design
services.description: We combine creative design and technical skills to build striking 3D visualisations that bring your project to life.

services.title: New Service
services.description: Add a new service for testing purposes.

aboutpara: Hi, I'm Sophia Carter, a senior graduate student in Computer Science with a strong foundation in software engineering and a passion for artificial intelligence and machine learning. Over the past 5 years, I have worked at Amazon and Google, where I contributed to building scalable systems, optimizing machine learning pipelines, and delivering impactful solutions.

resume.tagline: 👋  I'm a software engineer, PhD student, and a researcher
resume.description: Hi, I'm Sophia Carter, a senior graduate student in Computer Science with a strong foundation in software engineering and a passion for artificial intelligence and machine learning. Over the past 5 years, I have worked at Amazon and Google, where I contributed to building scalable systems, optimizing machine learning pipelines, and delivering impactful solutions.

experiences.bullets: Designed and implemented scalable machine learning pipelines for NLP applications. Improved model inference speed by 30% through optimization techniques. Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver AI-driven solutions.

experiences.position: Frontend Engineer and Designer at Meta
experiences.bullets: Developed and maintained backend services for high-traffic e-commerce platforms. Enhanced system reliability by implementing fault-tolerant architectures. Mentored junior engineers and conducted code reviews.
